import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:

for r in rows:

        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

Title: In which town will Saif al-Islam Gaddafi be buried by February 10, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-31. Saif al-Islam Gaddafi is a prominent Libyan political figure. In Libya, the burial place of a major public figure can carry political and tribal significance because towns are closely tied to family, factional, and historical loyalties.
---

Title: Which state will the U.S. Supreme Court let keep its new congressional map by February 2026 after rejecting a Republican lawsuit?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-14. The U.S. Supreme Court is reviewing disputes over mid-decade congressional maps ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. A ruling could determine whether one state's newly drawn U.S. House map stays in effect.
---
QID: 579252
Title: In which city will Amnesty International say wrestler Saleh Mohammadi has been sentenced to public execution, by February 14, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-12. Human rights groups are monitoring the treatment of detainees linked to unrest in Iran, including reports of severe punishments and death sentences. Statements from international rights organizations may identify where particular cases are being handled.
---
